features.name: sv_func_declaration_with_input_output_ports
features.description: Code should include an sv.func declaration with both input and explicitly returned output ports

features.name: sv_func_call_procedural
features.description: Code should include a procedural function call to an sv.func using sv.func.call.procedural syntax

features.name: sv_func_with_recursive_call
features.description: Code should include a function with recursive calls inside conditional logic

features.name: sv_logic_inout_for_function_result
features.description: Code should include sv.logic for creating an inout wire used to capture function return values
